summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 29.1 Hypothesis Contract + Core Engine. All 18 unit tests and 26 API integration tests passed successfully. All 4 API endpoints working correctly. The module correctly generates market hypotheses from intelligence layers (Alpha, Regime, Microstructure, MacroFractal) with proper scoring formula, confidence/reliability computation, and execution state mapping.
passed_tests: All 18 unit tests for hypothesis engine (hypothesis_tests.py)
GET /api/v1/hypothesis/current/{symbol} - returns valid hypothesis with all required fields
GET /api/v1/hypothesis/history/{symbol} - returns history records with correct structure
hypothesis_type validation - values are valid enum (BULLISH_CONTINUATION, BEARISH_CONTINUATION, etc.)
Candidate generation for all 5 hypothesis types (bullish/bearish continuation, breakout, mean reversion, no edge)
Execution state mapping from microstructure state

success_rate.backend: 100% - All API endpoints passed (26/26 API tests)

seed_data_creation: Hypothesis records automatically created via API calls during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hypothesis Engine module (Phase 29.1) is fully operational. Four endpoints tested: GET current, GET history, GET summary, POST recompute. Uses simulated data for Alpha, Regime, MacroFractal layers; MicrostructureContext pulls from real engine (Phase 28). All hypothesis types, directional bias, and execution states validated against enum constraints.
mocked_api_note: Alpha, Regime, and MacroFractal layers use SIMULATED/DEFAULT data within generate_hypothesis_simulated(). MicrostructureContext pulls from real Phase 28 engine.
